answers.Q2: Approximately 10,000 endpoints and 500 servers are in scope, including those at our headquarters, branches, and data centers.
answers.Q3: Yes, we have EDR tooling from Symantec and SIEM tooling from IBM QRadar currently deployed.
answers.Q5: We use Active Directory, and while we have no indication of compromise, we are taking precautions as part of our overall cyber resilience enhancement.
answers.Q6: We operate in the banking and financial services sector.
answers.Q11: Our systems are operational, but we are experiencing some delays in certain services as a precautionary measure while we enhance our security posture.
answers.Q13: We do not have a current IR retainer with any vendor, and we are reaching out to Proposal Engine because of your expertise in DFIR and compliance with RBI advisory on cyber resilience.

scope_context:
**Incident Type:** Unknown / Suspicious Activity
**Environment Size:** Approximately 10,000 endpoints and 500 servers are in scope, including those at our headquarters, branches, and data centers.
**Industry:** We operate in the banking and financial services sector.
**Applicable Frameworks:** RBI Cyber Security Framework, ISO/IEC 27001, CERT-In, DPDP Act 2023
**Engagement Timeline:** Planned (no active threat)
**Active Threat:** No

questions.text: What is the nature of the incident or security concern?
Has ransomware been deployed and are files encrypted?
Have attackers made contact with a ransom demand?
Which systems/business units have been impacted?
Are backups intact and tested?
What categories of data may have been exfiltrated?
Approximately how many records are potentially affected?
Was the breach through an external attacker or internal actor?
Have you notified any authorities or regulators?
Is this a current or former employee?
What data or systems were potentially accessed inappropriately?
Is HR or legal counsel currently involved?
Is the individual still employed/has access?
Was a fraudulent payment made? If yes, approximate amount?
Which email accounts were compromised?
Has the compromised account been quarantined?
Have you notified your bank or financial institution?
What anomalous activity was first observed?
When was the anomaly first noticed?
Which systems or users are affected?
Have you already engaged any security vendor or tool?
Approximately how many endpoints and servers are in scope?
Do you have EDR/SIEM tooling currently deployed? If yes, which products?
Is your environment on-premises, cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP), or hybrid?
Is Active Directory or Azure AD in use? Is it potentially compromised?
Are there OT/ICS systems in scope?
What industry/sector does your organisation operate in?
Which regulatory frameworks apply to your organisation?
Do you have external legal counsel engaged for this incident?
Has law enforcement been notified or is notification expected?
Is the threat active and ongoing right now?
What is the current business impact? (e.g., systems down, operations halted, revenue loss)
What is your desired engagement start timeline?
Do you have a current IR retainer with any vendor? If yes, why are you reaching out to Proposal Engine?
